goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 08:45' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should depart from 'birmingham new street' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'arrival time', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 08:45 and should leave on sunday
The train should depart from birmingham new street and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get train ID, arrival time, and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get address and phone number
